# Csv Join

## Overview

csv_join — join two or more stored CSV files via DuckDB.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `csv_join` | Left/right/inner/full join across two or more stored CSV files. | `core:csv_join` | — | — |
